name_en: YSL Monogram Caviar Envelope Bag. A super practical mini bag, the most classic style, upgraded to the highest version. 100% Italian calfskin with exquisite craftsmanship; custom metal YSL logo shows personality; flip-top design ensures security; small bag with large capacity, featuring 20 card slots, two bill compartments, two central compartments, and one zippered interior pocket. Model: S377828. Dimensions: 22x14x4cm
